question: What is the annual leave entitlement for full-time employees?
ground_truth: Full-time employees receive 25 days of paid annual leave per year.

question: How many days of notice must an employee give before resigning?
ground_truth: Employees must give at least 30 days written notice before resigning.

question: What is the company policy on remote work?
ground_truth: Employees may work remotely up to three days per week with manager approval.
source_snippet: up to three days per week
